generated_oml:
instance CartMotorActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Step‑motor driven cart motor controlled via TMC4671 Eval board, responsible for horizontal motion of the crane cart."
]
instance HoistMotorActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Step‑motor hoist motor driven via TMC4671 Eval board, responsible for vertical motion of the hoist."
]
instance ElectromagnetActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnet mounted on the hoist detecting and holding the container pucks during transfer."
]
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Encoder mounted on the hoist measuring pendulum swing angle."
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]
instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Wind speed sensor measuring airflow affecting crane dynamics."
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
]
instance CartPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder monitoring horizontal displacement of the cart."
    DTDFVocab:producedData CartPositionDataTransmitted
]
instance HoistPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder monitoring vertical displacement of the hoist."
    DTDFVocab:producedData HoistPositionDataTransmitted
]
instance CartCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring electrical load of the cart motor."
    DTDFVocab:producedData CartCurrentDataTransmitted
]
instance HoistCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring electrical load of the hoist motor."
    DTDFVocab:producedData HoistCurrentDataTransmitted
]
instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]
instance WindSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]
instance CartPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CartPositionEncoder
]
instance HoistPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HoistPositionEncoder
]
instance CartCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CartCurrentSensor
]
instance HoistCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HoistCurrentSensor
]
instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD geometry of the gantry crane built in Autodesk Fusion360."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GantryLibEnabler
]
instance KinematicTrajectoryModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model used for generating collision‑free trajectory plans."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TrajectoryEnabler
]
instance PhysicsBasedSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Physics‑based simulation predicting cart and hoist motion under load."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEnabler
]
instance TimeseriesDatabase : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB repository of logged state variables including position, currents, and swing angle."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
]
instance SimulationConfidenceBounds : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Confidence bounds for the physics‑based simulation predictions."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEnabler
]
instance TrajectoryRecord : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Recorded executed trajectories for comparison with simulation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ValidationEnabler
]
instance ContinuousValidationDistanceMetric : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Table of continuous validation distance metrics between executed and simulated trajectories."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ValidationEnabler
]
instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured swing angle of the crane’s hoist."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ValidationEnabler
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEnabler
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TrajectoryEnabler
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FaultEnabler
]
instance WindSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Wind speed measurement affecting crane dynamics."
    DTDFVocab:fromData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ValidationEnabler
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEnabler
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TrajectoryEnabler
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FaultEnabler
]
instance CartPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Horizontal displacement of the cart."
    DTDFVocab:fromData CartPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ValidationEnabler
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEnabler
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TrajectoryEnabler
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FaultEnabler
]
instance HoistPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vertical displacement of the hoist."
    DTDFVocab:fromData HoistPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ValidationEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData HoistPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEnabler
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TrajectoryEnabler
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FaultEnabler
]
instance CartCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Electrical current drawn by the cart motor."
    DTDFVocab:fromData CartCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ValidationEnabler
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEnabler
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TrajectoryEnabler
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FaultEnabler
]
instance HoistCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Electrical current drawn by the hoist motor."
    DTDFVocab:fromData HoistCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ValidationEnabler
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEnabler
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TrajectoryEnabler
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FaultEnabler
]
instance ActuatorControlInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight providing information about actuator state."
]
instance ActuatorControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Low‑level service for actuators, handling hardware commands."
    DTDFVocab:provides ActuatorControlInsight
]
instance GantryLibEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python library gantrylib that abstracts hardware control of the crane."
    DTDFVocab:enables ActuatorControlService
]
instance TimescaleDBEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB (PostgreSQL extension) used for time‑series storage of crane state variables."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataLoggingService
]
instance ValidationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler receiving telemetry for continuous validation against simulation results."
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidationService
]
instance SimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler supplying simulation models to the kinematic simulation service."
    DTDFVocab:enables KinematicSimulationService
]
instance TrajectoryEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler feeding trajectory data to the optimal trajectory generation service."
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalTrajectoryService
]
instance FaultEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler providing sensor data to the fault‑detection time‑series classification service."
    DTDFVocab:enables FaultDetectionService
]
instance DashboardEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler that forwards data to Grafana for real‑time visualization."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]
instance DataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Collects and stores telemetry in TimescaleDB for later analysis."
    DTDFVocab:provides DataLoggingInsight
]
instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuously compares executed trajectories against physics‑based simulation models."
    DTDFVocab:provides ContinuousValidationAlert
    DTDFVocab:provides AdjustControlParametersAction
]
instance KinematicSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Runs physics‑based simulation of cart and hoist motion."
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationResultInsight
]
instance OptimalTrajectoryService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates efficient motion plans for the crane using kinematic modeling."
    DTDFVocab:provides TrajectoryOptimizationOutput
]
instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Detects faults by classifying time‑series sensor data."
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultClassificationResult
    DTDFVocab:provides MaintenancePlanSuggestionAction
]
instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides real‑time dashboards in Grafana visualizing crane status."
    DTDFVocab:provides DashboardVisualization
]
instance ContinuousValidationAlert : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Alert generated when the distance metric between executed and simulated trajectories exceeds a threshold."
]
instance TrajectoryOptimizationOutput : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Suggested efficient trajectory plan indicating start, stop, and optimal speed profiles."
]
instance FaultClassificationResult : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Classification of detected faults with confidence scores for maintenance planning."
]
instance DashboardVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real‑time Grafana dashboard displaying crane parameters, alerts, and historical trends."
]
instance DataLoggingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Log entry confirming successful ingestion of a timeseries record into TimescaleDB."
]
instance SimulationResultInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation output detailing expected cart and hoist positions over time."
]
instance AdjustControlParametersAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of control settings (e.g., speed limits, acceleration) in response to validation alerts."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]
instance MaintenancePlanSuggestionAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Suggested maintenance tasks derived from fault‑classification results."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]
instance LabGantryCraneEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains SwingAngleEncoder, Anemometer, CartPositionEncoder, HoistPositionEncoder, CartCurrentSensor, HoistCurrentSensor, CartMotorActuator, HoistMotorActuator, ElectromagnetActuator
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Trajectory Generator and Control Application create optimal movement trajectories and send corresponding velocity/position commands through the Crane Interface to the motor driver boards; the MQTT broker mediates command payloads from the virtual side to the physical actuators; a Human–Machine Interface allows operators to send manual control commands which are likewise forwarded to the hardware."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "All services operate continuously in real‑time on the host machine; the Logging Application streams data as soon as sensors produce it; the Continuous Validation Service evaluates trajectories immediately after execution; the Trajectory Generator produces paths whenever requested; all are synchronized by the host’s system clock."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Physical side: crane hardware, Arduino controller, motor driver boards, sensors, and a Python crane interface; Digital side: Dockerised services (database, MQTT broker, dashboard, logging, simulation, validation, trajectory generator) interconnected via MQTT and HTTP; all orchestrated by Docker Compose on a single host computer, with the Human‑Machine Interface providing operator interaction."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "During design the DT uses CAD models of the crane (ideal geometry); manufacturing corresponds to the physically constructed crane whose parts are embodied by the actual hardware; operational twin services run in parallel with the physical system, continually updating models via sensor data and providing real‑time control and analytics."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity ensured by continuous comparison of logged sensor data against the simulated trajectory; a distance metric is computed and compared to a user‑defined threshold to trigger alerts; fault‑classification uses time‑series methods to identify deviations; validation assures that the digital trajectory matches physical execution within acceptable bounds."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT (Eclipse Mosquitto) broker handles publish/subscribe messaging between services (logging, validation, trajectory generator, dashboard); database connectivity uses PostgreSQL protocol; control commands are sent over serial/USB (via Crane Interface) to the TMC4671 motor drivers; the Human‑Machine Interface communicates over HTTP to the dashboard; all services run on the same host, connected via the local network."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "All digital twin services are containerised with Docker and launched using a Docker‑Compose file; the system runs on a local PC co‑locating the physical crane; the GitHub repository contains the code, Docker files, and documentation; the developer can install the Python module via pip and start the stack on any Linux/Windows machine supporting Docker."
]
